---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

One or two sentences describing the proposed feature.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits, and how? If it addresses a specific
pain point or use case, describe it concretely.

## Proposed solution

How should this work? Sketch the behavior, API, or UX. Include examples if they
help communicate intent.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you did not choose them. "Do nothing"
is a valid alternative to discuss.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, prior discussions, external references, or mockups.
